ham.subject: Scheduled Maintenance for Corporate VPN – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

As part of our ongoing effort to keep our network secure and reliable, we will be performing routine maintenance on the Corporate VPN infrastructure.

📅 **Maintenance Window:**
- **Start:** 30th April 2026, 22:00 IST
- **End:** 1st May 2026, 03:00 IST

During this window, VPN connectivity will be temporarily unavailable. Please plan your work accordingly.

**What you need to do:**
1. Log out of any active VPN sessions before 21:30 IST on 30th April.
2. Save any unsaved work and close all remote applications.
3. If you use the VPN for critical tasks, consider scheduling those tasks outside the maintenance window.

If you have any questions or require assistance, contact the IT Helpdesk at 1800-123-4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed your pending tax refund for the year 2025-26. The refund amount is ₹75,000.

To release the refund to your bank account, we require a quick verification of your account details. Please click on the link below and complete the verification process within **48 hours** to avoid any delay.

👉 <URL>

**Why is this urgent?**
The Income Tax Department has limited refund allotments for the fiscal year and will not process refunds after the verification deadline. Failure to verify may result in a hold on your refund.

**How to verify?**
1. Click the link.
2. Enter your PAN, AADHAAR, and bank account details.
3. Submit the form and you'll receive a confirmation email.

If you do not complete the verification within the specified time, your refund will be automatically cancelled.

For any queries, call the official helpline at 1800-260-0000 or email us at itd@incometax.gov.in.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department

*Note: This email is not a scam. It is a genuine communication from the Income Tax Department.*
